description: 手机+入门版耳机面对面翻译

success_signals.pattern: Mobile phone -Entry-level headset translation task preparation completed, Device ID: .*

failure_signals.pattern: ASRTimeout, using the last updated result.

lifecycle_signals.pattern: The recording duration has reached the limit. （.* seconds), recording stops automatically; Device ID: .*
Start phone -Entry-level headset translation task, Device ID: .*
Start preparing the mobile phone -Entry-level headset translation task, Device ID: .*
Start/stop phone -Entry-level headset translation task, Device ID: .*
Mobile phone -Entry-level headset translation task paused, Device ID: .*
Stop phone -Entry-level headset translation task, Device ID: .*

noise_patterns: Finished playing buffered TTS data, remaining buffer: %lu b
Played additional buffered TTS data: %lu bytes
Buffering new TTS data while playing buffered TTS: %lu byte
